title: tetradymia × permixta
intro: Tetradymia × permixta is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross-breeding of Tetradymia glabra and Tetradymia nuttallii. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tetradymia × permixta include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Tetradymia × permixta is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
